# MDAttributeObserver
Class for observing changes to a specific attribute on a target element.

## Constructor
Creates an instance of MDAttributeObserver.

Name | Type | Default | Description
--- | --- | --- | ---
`callback` | `function` | () => {} | The callback function to execute when attribute changes are detected.

## Methods

### `observe(target,attributeName)`
Starts observing changes to the specified attribute on the target element.

Name | Type | Default | Description
--- | --- | --- | ---
`target` | `Element` |  | The target element to observe.
`attributeName` | `string` |  | The name of the attribute to observe.

# MDColorPickerComponent
The `MDColorPickerComponent` interface represents an HTML `<md-color-picker>` element, Color picker component for selecting colors.

## Constructor
Creates an instance of the color picker component.

## Inheritance
`MDSheetComponent`

## Events
Listen to these events using `addEventListener()`, or by assigning an event listener to the `@onEventName` property of this interface.

Name | Description
--- | ---
`onColorPickerIconButtonClick` | Fired when an icon button is clicked.
`onColorPickerButtonClick` | Fired when a button is clicked.
`onColorPickerIconButtonPrevClick` | Fired when the previous icon button is clicked.
`onColorPickerIconButtonNextClick` | Fired when the next icon button is clicked.
`onColorPickerButtonLabelClick` | Fired when the label button is clicked.
`onColorPickerButtonCancelClick` | Fired when the cancel button is clicked.
`onColorPickerButtonOkClick` | Fired when the OK button is clicked.
`onColorPickerGradientTrackPointerdown` | Fired when the gradient track is pressed.
`onColorPickerGradientTrackPointermove` | Fired when the gradient track is moved.
`onColorPickerGradientTrackPointerup` | Fired when the gradient track is released.
`onColorPickerHueNativeInput` | Fired when the hue input changes.
`onColorPickerSelection` | Fired when a color is selected.
`onColorPickerOpacityNativeInput` | Fired when the opacity input changes.

## Instance properties
This interface also inherits properties from its parent, `MDSheetComponent`.

Name | Type | Default | Description
--- | --- | --- | ---
`value` | `String` |  | The currently selected color value in hex format.
`childNodes_` | `get` |  | Gets the child nodes of the component.
`childNodes_` | `set` |  | Sets the child nodes of the component.
`leadingActions` | `get` |  | Gets the leading actions of the color picker.
`actions` | `get` |  | {{description}}
## Instance methods
This interface also inherits methods from its parent, `MDSheetComponent`.

### `showModal(button,options)`
Displays the modal with the color picker.

Name | Type | Default | Description
--- | --- | --- | ---
`button` | `HTMLElement` |  | The button element.
`options` | `Object` |  | The modal options.


### `show(button,options)`
Shows the color picker.

Name | Type | Default | Description
--- | --- | --- | ---
`button` | `HTMLElement` |  | The button element.
`options` | `Object` |  | The display options.

# MDFormComponent
The `MDFormComponent` interface represents an HTML `<md-form>` element, Form component that extends the MDComponent base class.

## Constructor
Initializes a new instance of the MDFormComponent.
Sets default values for form attributes.

## Inheritance
`MDComponent`

## Events
Listen to these events using `addEventListener()`, or by assigning an event listener to the `@onEventName` property of this interface.

Name | Description
--- | ---
`onFormNativeReset` | Fired when the form is reset.
`onFormNativeSubmit` | Fired when the form is submitted.

## Instance properties
This interface also inherits properties from its parent, `MDComponent`.

Name | Type | Default | Description
--- | --- | --- | ---
`acceptCharset` | `String` |  | The character encodings that are to be used for the form submission.
`action` | `String` |  | The URL that processes the form submission.
`autocomplete` | `String` |  | Indicates whether the form should have autocomplete on or off.
`enctype` | `String` |  | The encoding type of the form.
`method` | `String` |  | The HTTP method used to submit the form.
`name` | `String` |  | The name of the form.
`novalidate` | `Boolean` |  | Indicates that the form should not be validated when submitted.
`target` | `String` |  | The browsing context in which to display the response received after submitting the form.
## Instance methods
This interface also inherits methods from its parent, `MDComponent`.

### `reset()`
Resets the form programmatically.
Equivalent to clicking the reset button.


### `submit()`
Submits the form programmatically.
Equivalent to clicking the submit button.

# MDStore
MDStore provides CRUD operations and advanced querying capabilities for an array of documents.

## Constructor
Creates an instance of MDStore.

Name | Type | Default | Description
--- | --- | --- | ---
`docs` | `Array` | [] | Initial array of documents.
`options` | `Object` | {} | Options for configuring the store.

Name | Type | Default | Description
--- | --- | --- | ---
`options.primaryKey` | `string` | "_id" | Primary key field used for document identification.

## Methods

### `post(doc)`
Adds a new document to the store.

Name | Type | Default | Description
--- | --- | --- | ---
`doc` | `Object` |  | The document to add.


Return
`Object`

The added document.

### `get(_id)`
Retrieves a document by its primary key.

Name | Type | Default | Description
--- | --- | --- | ---
`_id` | `*` |  | The value of the primary key.


Return
`Object`,`null`

The matching document, or null if not found.

### `patch(_id,doc)`
Updates a document by its primary key.

Name | Type | Default | Description
--- | --- | --- | ---
`_id` | `*` |  | The value of the primary key.
`doc` | `Object` |  | The partial document object with fields to update.


Return
`Object`,`null`

The updated document, or null if the document was not found.

### `delete(_id)`
Deletes a document by its primary key.

Name | Type | Default | Description
--- | --- | --- | ---
`_id` | `*` |  | The value of the primary key.


Return
`Object`,`null`

The deleted document, or null if the document was not found.

### `put(doc)`
Adds or updates a document based on its primary key.

Name | Type | Default | Description
--- | --- | --- | ---
`doc` | `Object` |  | The document to put.


Return
`Object`

The added or updated document.

### `getAll(options)`
Retrieves all documents from the store based on query options.

Name | Type | Default | Description
--- | --- | --- | ---
`options` | `Object` | {} | Query options including sorting, filtering, search, pagination, and additional filters.


Name | Type | Default | Description
--- | --- | --- | ---
options._sort | `string` |  | Comma-separated list of fields to sort by.
options._order | `string` |  | Comma-separated list of sort orders (asc, desc).
options.q | `string` |  | Query string for full-text search.
options._page | `number` |  | Page number for pagination.
options._limit | `number` |  | Number of documents per page for pagination.
options._start | `number` |  | Start index for slicing.
options._end | `number` |  | End index for slicing.
options.sorters | `Array` |  | Array of sorting criteria objects.
options.filters | `Array` |  | Array of filter criteria objects.

Return
`Object`

An object containing the total number of documents and the array of documents based on the query.
